wildlife.name: White-tailed Deer
wildlife.description: Often seen near forest edges at dawn and dusk.
wildlife.notes: Look for hoof prints that form two teardrops.

wildlife.name: Red Fox
wildlife.description: Adaptable canine; may appear along field margins and quiet paths.

wildlife.name: Pileated Woodpecker
wildlife.description: Large woodpecker; listen for resonant drumming on dead snags.
